description: The NotificationPanel component is used in user space to show the User their notifications.

fields.DisplayDuration: How long to show notifications for.
fields.Dash: The component for the dash in the same world.
fields._notificationClip: The audio to play on a new notification made.
fields._contactRequestClip: The audio to play on a new contact request being made.
fields._inviteClip: The audio to play on an invite clip being made.
fields._sociableClip: The audio to play when a friend goes to social status.
fields._userJoinClip: The audio to play when a user joins.
fields._userLeaveClip: The audio to play when a user leaves.

methods.OnNotificationPressed: Called when a notification element is touched.
